n: Book 8, Chapter 4: A Wager in the Wold

steps.t: Elthengels is south-west of Floodwend, and you do not have much time in which to reach it before Elfsige does!
You have arrived at Elthengels, but there is no sign of Elfsige. You should speak with Thurhun, the guard at the entrance to Elthengels, to see if he …
Elfsige may be in trouble among the trees south of the road between Elthengels and Floodwend. Elfsige never arrived at Elthengels, and now you should …
Elfsige has returned to Elthengels, in the Norcrofts. You should return to Elthengels and speak with Elfsige there.
